task_description: Implement all 41 platform audit fixes: critical security, high-priority backend, database, devops, business logic, missing features, testing, frontend improvements, and cleanup items

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds, npx tsc --noEmit clean, 18 backend tests pass, 1 frontend test passes. v2 semantic review APPROVED. All critical security issues fixed, Zod validators properly typed, CSRF gaps closed, job queue race fixed.
